structural.title: Telha Clarke — Melbourne based Architecture & Interior Design studio

headings.text:
Driven by History, Centered on
Context, Embracing Culture

Telha Clarke is a Melbourne
based Architecture & Interior Design studio,
designing various project typologies across
Australia and Internationally.

With experience covering a range of typologies; from single &
multi-residential, seniors living, student accommodation, social
housing, hotels, hospitality and workplace. We believe human
touch must d

The scope of our Studio covers all stages within
Architecture and Interior Design. We offer an end
to end level of service from early concepts
through to practical completion.

metas.description: Melbourne based architecture and interior design studio working across diverse project types in Australia and internationally.
metas.og:title: Telha Clarke — Melbourne based Architecture & Interior Design studio
